package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for count_inside_loop: COUNT(...) or GORM Count(...) observed inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule250NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario250Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule250NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
